name: Aptean, Inc.
lede: Aptean runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Madurai, covering SSC and R&D, built over 28 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Aptean office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Aptean, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Aptean runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Madurai), covering SSC and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Aptean's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Madurai, spanning SSC and R&D. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all fourteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Aptean operate in India?
faq.a: Aptean operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Aptean have centers in?
faq.a: Aptean's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Aptean run in India?
faq.a: Aptean runs SSC and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Aptean's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Aptean's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Aptean's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Aptean's India centers, across IT and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
